question: The chart shows the defect rate in production over time (out of a possible 0–10%). Based on the data shown, which statement best describes the change in defect rate?

options.A: The defect rate changed only slightly over the period
options.B: There was a dramatic increase in the defect rate
options.C: The defect rate fluctuated wildly with large jumps up and down
options.D: The defect rate stayed exactly the same every year

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (5.46–5.62%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.14% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
